description: Backend data contract for Add Student page – single student registration (multi-step) and bulk CSV import.

getDropdownOptions.description: Fetch static dropdown data for the form: classes, sections, blood groups, genders, relationships.

checkEmailAvailability.description: Check if an email address is already used by any student.

checkPhoneAvailability.description: Check if a phone number is already used by any student.

createStudent.description: Create a new student record. Validates required fields (firstName, lastName, dob, class, section, p1name, p1phone).

requestBody.p1rel: enum: Father, Mother, Guardian, Other (default Father)
requestBody.p2rel: enum: Father, Mother, Guardian, Other (default Mother)

400.message: Validation error – missing required fields or invalid data

bulkImportTemplate.description: Download a CSV template file for bulk student import.
bulkImportTemplate.response: CSV file download (text/csv) with headers: firstName, lastName, gender, dateOfBirth, bloodGroup, class, section, rollNumber, parent1Name, parent1Phone, email

validateBulkImport.description: Validate a CSV file before import (no actual data insertion). Returns validation errors per row.

bulkImportStudents.description: Import students from a validated CSV file (inserts all valid rows, rolls back entire transaction if any error occurs? Frontend does batch simulation, but backend should support atomic or partial with reporting).

fieldNotes.dob: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required for single student addition; optional in bulk (but frontend template includes dateOfBirth column as optional).
fieldNotes.cls: Class value must match one of the predefined CLASSES list.
fieldNotes.p1phone: Primary parent phone number – required; format should be validated (e.g., +91 followed by 10 digits).
fieldNotes.bulk import CSV: File must be CSV with comma delimiter, header row present. Maximum 5000 rows. Supported columns: firstName, lastName, gender, dateOfBirth, bloodGroup, class, section, rollNumber, parent1Name, parent1Phone, email. Only firstName, lastName, class, section, parent1Name, parent1Phone are mandatory; others optional. Date format: YYYY-MM-DD.
